Episode: “UFO Secrets Are Held By A Global Cabal” (Ft. Steven Greer)
Per John Warner IV's conversation with Greer: Paul Mellon personally retrieved a Nazi electrogravitic flying disc (not a ramjet) from Germany in 1945; it was unstable.
Naval Research Labs top scientist Richard Foch confirmed to Greer he had been in the vault and seen documents dated October 1954 for the date the US mastered gravity control.
Greer argues that the Disclosure Project's 2001 National Press Club event (seen by 800M people) was about to break UAP wide open — and 9/11 happened months later 'as a direct consequence' diversion.

Greer states (citing sources with 'actionable intelligence') that JFK was killed over the UAP issue — specifically over the constellation of programs attached to the 'Gaps' science-and-technology bran

Greer asserts there is an active government effort to spin UAP as an 'alien threat' in order to lay foundation for a totalitarian superstate — calling this a 'total hoax and nonsense' and a CIA-author
Greer states on camera he met people who worked on the human-operated 'abduction squad' — made to impersonate aliens — who now feel terrible about their past actions.
Greer prepared a redacted Disclosure Project briefing document for the new US administration with 90%+ of the content the President sees — now publicly released.
